Smart Automation
🐼 Panda Agent Mode
⚫ Offline
🎙️ Background Listener
Say "Jarvis" anytime — phone locked or open
🔴 Background listening is off
⚡ Run Agent Command
📋 Action Log
No actions yet. Say "Jarvis open YouTube" to test.
⚙️ Wake Word Settings
⚡ Triggers

Automate JARVIS on time, boot, charging — like Tasker.

➕ New Trigger
No triggers yet. Create your first!
🎙️ Background Listener
🎙️
Inactive
Enable from Panda Mode tab
How it works
1. Enable background listener from Panda Mode tab
2. JARVIS runs in background via DroidScript service
3. Say "Jarvis" anywhere — even when screen is off
4. Speak your command after vibration
5. JARVIS executes it automatically

Example commands:
• "Jarvis open WhatsApp"
• "Jarvis call Mom"
• "Jarvis set timer 5 minutes"
• "Jarvis navigate to nearest petrol pump"
• "Jarvis play Arijit Singh on YouTube"
⚠️ Android Battery Fix
• Settings → Battery → App Launch → set JARVIS to "Manage manually" → enable all 3 toggles
• Settings → Developer Options → Don't keep activities → OFF
• Keep screen on for best detection on MIUI/OriginOS

Quick Actions
🧠 Jarvis Memory

Train JARVIS by importing a file or by saying: "learn that [question] is [answer]"

JSON: [{"question":"...","answer":"..."}] or [{"q":"...","a":"..."}]

TXT formats: Q: question then A: answer | or question | answer | or question = answer

Customize Experience
🎨 UI Theme & Style
🌌
Default Dark
☀️
Clean Light
🌊
Ocean Breeze
🌙
Midnight Gold
🌿
Forest Ninja
🌸
Rose Blaze
💻
Hacker Green
💡 Tip: Tap any theme to instantly preview. Theme switcher button also available (bottom-right).
📖 Complete Command Guide

Comprehensive list of all JARVIS commands. Say them or type them!

Custom Commands

JSON format: [{"name":"...","trigger":"...","actions":["openApp:whatsapp","speak:Hello","url:https://..."]}]

Voice Settings

Configure voice and notification settings below.

Persistent Notification

Creates a notification in your shade (like the music player) with Speak and Type buttons — command JARVIS without opening the app.

Background Wake Service

Listens for "Jarvis" wake word even when app is minimized. Notification shows Speak/Type buttons to control without opening app.

⚠️ Requires DroidScript app · Uses microphone in background

🌤 Weather Intelligence

Voice commands: "what's the weather", "will it rain today", "weather in Mumbai"

📅 Calendar & Events
Today's Schedule
All Events
🔐 Secure Notes

Notes are encrypted with AES-256. Set a password when creating your first note. Forget the password = lose the note.

📁 File Manager
Path: /sdcard

DroidScript file access. Works fully inside DroidScript app. Web preview shows simulated structure.

🏠 Smart Home

Supports HTTP/REST smart devices, TP-Link Kasa, Philips Hue, and custom HTTP endpoints.

Voice: "turn on living room light", "set fan to 50%", "turn off all devices"

Quick Scenes
📊 System Monitor
Quick Actions

Voice: "how's my battery", "check storage", "free up space", "network info"

📋 Code Templates
🧩 Plugin Manager

Load external JS plugins by URL or file. Each plugin can add new voice commands and UI panels.

Plugin format: {"name":"...","trigger":"...","execute":"function(J){...}"}

🔄 CORS Tester

        

          

          

          

            

            

          

          
        

        

        

          
⚠️ CORS Security Notes

          

            • Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * allows any origin (risky for authenticated APIs)

            • Missing CORS headers = browser blocks cross-origin requests (good!)

            • Credentials cannot be sent when origin is wildcard (*)

🪪 UUID Generator

        

          

            
            
            
          

          

          
        

        

          
UUID Version Guide

          v4: Fully random — most common, used for database IDs.

          v1: Time + MAC-based — predictable but sortable.

          v7: Time-ordered random — best for databases needing sort order.

🛡️ Password Breach Checker

    

      

        
        
      

      
      

    

    

      
🔑 PASSWORD STRENGTH ANALYZER

      
      

      

    

    

      
🔒 How it works

      
Uses HaveIBeenPwned API with k-anonymity. Only the first 5 chars of the SHA-1 hash are sent. Your actual password never leaves your device.

📱 DroidScript App Compatibility

    

    

      
Runtime: DroidScript HTML AppType · Android 9+ WebView

      
Constraints: XHR-only (no fetch), ES5-safe JS, no native DOM printing, no WebRTC P2P, limited file API, no service workers on file:// protocol.

    

    

  




  
    
    

      

        

          
🔑 AI Engine Manager

          
        

        

          🤖 JARVIS AI Center — Select your AI engine. Pollinations is always FREE — no key needed, always works as fallback! Add API keys for premium models (Gemini, OpenAI, Grok etc) for smarter responses.

          ✅ Conversation history: JARVIS remembers your last 12 turns
        

        

          

            
            Loading AI Manager...
          

        

      

    


    
    

      

        
📋 Developer Docs


        
        

          
📖 README — OM AI JARVIS v4

          

            Project: OM AI JARVIS — India's most advanced on-device AI assistant

            Developer: Omkareshwar Sinha

            Platform: DroidScript (HTML AppType, Simple template) · Android 9+

            Engine: Chrome 67-based WebView · ES5 strict · XMLHttpRequest only

            Version: 4.0.0 · Single-file HTML (~25,000 lines)

            AI Backend: Pollinations (default, free) + Gemini/OpenAI/Grok/OpenRouter/HuggingFace

            TTS: Indian Hindi (hi-IN) + Indian English (en-IN) · Human-like prosody
          

        


        
        

          
🏗️ Architecture

          

            User Input

              ↓ processInput() — multi-command split

              ↓ runCmd() — command router

              ├── Custom Commands / Plugins

              ├── Memory lookup (localStorage)

              ├── App open / Call / Reminder / Timer

              ├── Weather / Calendar / System

              ├── Image Generation (Pollinations)

              └── webSearch() → _jarvisAI.ask()

                    ├── Selected AI engine (Gemini/OpenAI/Grok...)

                    └── Fallback: Pollinations (always free)

            Reply → addMsg() + voice.speak() [hi-IN / en-IN]
          

        


        
        

          
✨ Feature Modules (100+)

          

            
🤖 AI Chat (multi-provider)
🎨 7 UI Themes

            
🗣️ Indian TTS (hi-IN+en-IN)
🧠 Memory system

            
📱 App launcher
📞 Call & Contacts

            
⏰ Reminders & Alarms
🌤️ Weather (Open-Meteo)

            
📅 Calendar & Events
🔐 Secure Notes (AES)

            
💻 JarvisCode IDE
🎵 Music Player

            
📷 QR Generator
🖼️ AI Image Gen

            
🔒 MediVault Fortress
📊 Finance Tracker

            
🎯 15+ Games
🔐 Cyber Security Tools

            
📟 Termux Plugin
🌐 OSINT Tools

            
⚡ Automation
🧩 Extensions system

            
📍 Pincode Lookup
🌡️ Unit Converter

            
🌅 Sunrise/Sunset
📐 Accelerometer

            
🔡 Caesar/Vigenère
📝 OCR Scanner

            
🎨 Whiteboard
🧘 Pomodoro Timer

          

        


        
        

          
🛡️ Privacy Policy

          

            Data Collection: OM AI JARVIS does NOT collect, store, or transmit any personal data to external servers.

            Local Storage Only: All user data (memories, notes, contacts, settings) is stored exclusively on your device via localStorage.

            API Keys: API keys you add are stored locally on device. They are sent only to the respective AI provider (Gemini/OpenAI etc) when you make a request.

            AI Queries: Your chat messages are sent to the AI provider you select. With Pollinations (default), queries go to pollinations.ai — see their privacy policy.

            Microphone: Used only when you tap the mic button or enable auto-mic. Voice data is processed locally by Android's speech recognition.

            Permissions: RECORD_AUDIO (voice), READ_CONTACTS (call), INTERNET (AI/weather/news), CAMERA (QR scanner, optional).

            No Ads: This app contains no advertisements.

📝 Changelog

          

            v4.0.0 — 7 UI Themes · Claude-like AI replies · Conversation history · Indian TTS upgrade · ChatGPT-like dashboard · Multi-provider AI engine

            v3.0.0 — Pollinations vision API · 20+ new features · Face/Gesture control · AI Writing · Mind Map · Expense AI

            v2.0.0 — Bug fixes · 14 feature groups · MediVault · OSINT toolkit · Cybersecurity tools

            v1.0.0 — Initial release · Core AI · App launcher · Calls · Reminders
          

        


        
        

          

            Build: OM AI JARVIS v4.0.0

            Target: DroidScript HTML AppType · Android 9+ (API 28+)

            WebView: Chrome 67 (Android System WebView)

            JS Standard: ES5 + ES6 classes (no optional chaining, no nullish coalescing)

            Network: XMLHttpRequest only (no fetch() — WebView CORS restriction)

            Size: ~1.3 MB single file · 25,000+ lines

            AI Default: Pollinations.ai (free, no key required)

            Developer: Omkareshwar Sinha
